repos.name: meetily
repos.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
repos.descEn: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes
repos.descKo: 개인 정보 보호 우선, Rust를 기반으로 구축된 4배 빠른 앵무새/속삭임 실시간 전사, 화자 분할 및 Ollama 요약 기능을 갖춘 AI 회의 도우미입니다. 100% 현지 처리. 클라우드가 필요하지 않습니다. Meetily(Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai)는 macOS 및 Windows용 최고의 자체 호스팅 오픈 소스 Ai 회의 메모 작성기입니다. 회의록 작성 방법 이해하기

repos.name: system_prompts_leaks
repos.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.descEn: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.descKo: Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design에서 시스템 프롬프트를 추출했습니다. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, 반중력. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity 등. 정기적으로 업데이트됩니다.

repos.name: OfficeCLI
repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descEn: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descKo: OfficeCLI는 AI 에이전트가 Word, Excel 및 PowerPoint 파일을 읽고 편집하고 자동화할 수 있도록 특별히 제작된 최초이자 최고의 Office 제품군입니다. 무료, 오픈 소스, 단일 바이너리, Office 설치가 필요하지 않습니다.

repos.name: OmniRoute
repos.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
repos.descEn: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
repos.descKo: 코딩을 멈추지 마세요. 무료 AI 게이트웨이: 하나의 엔드포인트, 231개 이상의 공급자(50개 이상 무료), Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline 및 Copilot을 무료 Claude/GPT/Gemini에 연결합니다. RTK+Caveman 스택 압축은 토큰 15~95%, 스마트 자동 대체, MCP/A2A, 다중 모드 API, 데스크톱/PWA를 절약합니다.

repos.name: orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.descEn: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.descKo: Orca는 다수의 병렬 에이전트와 작업하기 위한 ADE입니다. 자신만의 구독으로 코딩 에이전트를 실행하세요. 데스크탑과 모바일에서 사용 가능합니다.

repos.name: claude-video
repos.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.descEn: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.descKo: Claude에게 모든 비디오를 볼 수 있는 기능을 제공하십시오. /watch는 다운로드하고, 프레임을 추출하고, 복사하고, 모든 것을 Claude에게 전달합니다.

repos.name: strix
repos.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
repos.descEn: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
repos.descKo: 앱의 취약점을 찾아 수정하는 오픈 소스 AI 침투 테스트 도구입니다.

repos.name: caveman
repos.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
repos.descEn: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
repos.descKo: 🪨 소수의 토큰이 트릭을 할 때 많은 토큰을 사용하는 이유 — 원시인처럼 말하여 토큰의 65%를 삭감하는 클로드 코드 스킬

repos.descEn: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: claude-skills
